hero.name: Shameer Ali
hero.heading: Hi! I'm Shameer Ali
hero.description: Student at Agriculture University Peshawar, passionate frontend developer. Currently learning Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB on the path to becoming a full stack developer. Ask me about HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React — I love building projects and learning new technologies.

about.title: GOAL: BECOME A FULL STACK DEVELOPER
about.description: I am a student at Agriculture University Peshawar and a passionate frontend developer. I care about clean UI, React, and the MERN ecosystem. I'm sharpening my skills with Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. Ask me about HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React — and check out my featured projects from ecommerce to booking systems.

details.title: ShopSphere Ecommerce (React)
details.description:
A full shopping experience with product listing, a shopping cart, responsive layouts, and cart data persisted with local storage.

Highlights: product listing, shopping cart system, responsive design, local storage cart functionality.

details.title: Personal Portfolio Website
details.description:
Portfolio site showcasing projects and personality with a modern UI, full responsiveness, and a dedicated contact section.

Highlights: modern UI, fully responsive, project showcase, contact section.

details.title: Hotel Booking Management System
details.description:
Booking-focused app with room flows, an admin area, and customer-facing booking screens.

Highlights: room booking system, admin dashboard, customer booking interface, booking management.

allService.title: Frontend & React
allService.subTitle: Interfaces with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React — responsive, maintainable, and user-focused.

allService.title: MERN direction
allService.subTitle: Growing with the MERN stack and modern tooling as I move toward full stack development.

allService.title: Next.js · Node · MongoDB
allService.subTitle: Currently deepening skills in Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB for full stack projects.

allService.title: Responsive UI
allService.subTitle: Layouts that work across devices, with attention to performance and accessibility.

allExperience.companyDescription: Studying while building real projects — including ecommerce, portfolio sites, and booking systems. Passionate about the MERN stack and progressing toward full stack development with Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.

Featured work includes ShopSphere (React ecommerce), a live portfolio on Vercel, and a hotel booking management system. If you like these projects, star the repositories and connect via GitHub or my portfolio site.

allTestimonial.reviewText: Goal: become a full stack developer — Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB are the next steps on that path.
I love building projects and learning new technologies. Ask me about HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.
Frontend developer, React enthusiast, MERN stack developer — passionate about shipping usable, responsive interfaces.

sectionHeading.title: Connect with me
sectionHeading.subTitle: Portfolio and GitHub are the best places to see my work. I'm open to collaborations and interesting frontend projects.
